segments.text: It's a very great day for Me to see so many Sahaja Yogis here who are from this country,
Greece.
When first I came into Greece i told My husband that This Country is full of vibrations
and there have been many evolved souls in the country but perhaps people lost
their heritage, but the vibrations are in that atmosphere.
And one day Sahaja Yoga should prosper here very much and somehow we met some bureaucrats
who were Greeks – experience was not good with them–and my husband said
if you say they're Greeks or really religious people then look at these
people, what are they doing to Me? I said there may be bureaucrats and all over bureaucrats
you can't say sort of people. But on the whole the vibrations were very good no doubt
And I went to all the places in here, like I've been to Delphi.
I have been up there too see Athena's temple and everything
To All The Places Of Interest they took Me down
Especially me because he was busy with his conference
So They Took Me Down
Everywhere i felt even sea was so beautiful
This was about, I think – I came here at least about fifteen years back maybe fourteen
years ago.
And now the vibrations are coming through you people and again the whole place is
vibrating.
Now You have to understand that your people has a very big responsibility because you
strategically placed in Greece, you see.
Greece and Italy – I mean Turkey both are very important
First of all You're the bridge between
The eastern side And western side
Everybody is interested In somehow or other managing
These two areas so that they could control
Eastern & Western Side
I'm in the western country specially
Now the greatest danger that you have now is,
this Western culture may try to grab your hand
and which it's very dangerous.
To understand It
You've got know That
people coming from a great tradition
ancient peoples of ages just like Indians
And there are so many things
can do to improve the culture of Europe by your own behavior.
Like these people who are coming here, tourists that come and they see the behavior
of the Greeks, and they see that they can influence very well.
The Europeans think
that Greeks could be easily influenced by their culture
or cheap life
So you being such traditional people down to earth
and so many, so many good things you have known in life.
It's very important to understand
the historical background of your country first off all
For Sahaja Yogis it is very important
To be educated that way
because tomorrow will talk with other people
And we'll tell them about Athena
About your traditions, about your background and how it is connected to Sahaja Yoga.
Connected with Mother Mary, connected Christ all those things
For this its very necessary that we should try
To understand the historical backgrounds of these countries
And educate yourself in a way
That you can talk about Sahajyoga
As at least you know Athena has the Kundalini
in Her hand and you can see that clearly
she was Dadi Shakti.
Actually, In Sanskrit language
Artha means Primordial
so She is the Primordial Mother
because there's no connection left between
The Greeks & Indians
this translation
Was not their and they didn't know what it meant by Athena
But Indians know that it is, this the place for the manifestation of the Adi Shakti because
in Devi Mahatma if you read or find out they have described Greece as Manipur Dweep.
I mean island in the Manipure – Manipura is this Nabhi Chakra so in the Nabi there
an island which is over Greece where the goddess resides, Manipur Chakra.
And so this Athena has been described and when I went to her temple that there was
a little Temple for child God – that was Shri Ganesha!
And then when I went to Delphi also,
When they were there
and was surprised too see
They showed Me a mound said this is the Nabhi
navel of whole universe.
As if that's correct
But when i turned round
There where lots of vibrations
What did find
Is Ganesha statue
Then Rehgar came here
He took photographs
Everything

So now you are the Nabi
You're sitting in the Nabi
Of The Whole Universe
So how important is Nabhi, you know that very well.
That Nabi Chakra gets spoiled
the whole life becomes miserable for a human being
so on right side of the nabhi as we see
it's a liver
and because off course
We had lots philosophers
they used to think alot
And they created lot of tragedies
You see Greek tragedy was well known
Where marriage system
Was little bit challenged
that there was, say two men one woman or maybe
2 women 1 man and never they felt happy with the marriage.
So The Left Navi was under attack throughout
To have such a tragedy
They wrote so many I would say
So Many Dramas
And they played them here
so many plays were there, showing that
There are two men and one woman or
Two women
And One man.
No relationship between the husband

That Was The Tragedy

To begin with

What should we do
Why Should We
Why should we try to show that
We are happy,
you have very unhappy people
and all these things started here
To begin with.
Then came this your
Orthodox Church
Now the orthodox church is another one
which of course
Is really doesn't treat women
Very well
And treats them
As if they're
All time unholy
Certain times
They cannot go to church
and they cannot touch people, all kinds of nonsensical ideas
They had.
That also made women very left-sided
Then on top that
All this was happening with these tragedies
And then suddenly the economic problem came up
People felt very sort of disgusted about that
So The Left Side became very prominent here
And that is how I think many of these left-sided
Buddhist organizations started.
Then, many gurus came who made you feel miserable
but the worse was done by Greek church which
make me so guilty
So You became very left sided
Now this Left Sided Net

working too hard and all those things.

otherwise
